description: Epic tales of gods, heroes, ancient civilizations, mythological creatures, and dark fantasy worlds. Greek, Roman, Norse, Egyptian, and beyond.
target_audience: 18-45 mythology enthusiasts, fantasy lovers, history fans
_checkpoint_note: Juggernaut XL produces painterly cinematic quality matching the dark fantasy aesthetic. Falls back to base SDXL if unavailable.

myth_short.description: 60-90 sec retelling of a single mythological moment
myth_short.tone: dramatic, mythic, every word carries weight

epic_tale.description: 5-8 min full mythological story with narrative arc
epic_tale.tone: cinematic, grand, poetic, builds to a powerful conclusion

god_profile.description: 6-10 min deep dive into a god, hero, or creature

dark_legend.description: 8-12 min dark retelling of a cursed myth or fallen hero

narrator.name: The Oracle
narrator.personality: ancient storyteller who speaks as if recounting memories, not stories
narrator.voice_style: deep, measured, resonant, slightly otherworldly, like thunder heard from a distance

visual_style.art_style: epic cinematic digital oil painting, dramatic painterly style, baroque lighting, hyper-detailed fantasy art, dark fantasy aesthetic, photorealistic yet painterly, cinematic composition, inspired by classical mythology paintings
visual_style.color_palette: stormy greys and dark blues, ancient gold and bronze, deep crimson accents, pale ethereal white, shadow black, oxidized copper green
visual_style.quality_tags: masterpiece, epic, cinematic, hyper-detailed, painterly oil texture, dramatic lighting, award-winning digital art, 8K quality, atmospheric
visual_style.negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, flat, low quality, watermark, text, modern clothing, contemporary, blurry, washed out, low detail, plastic, 3D render

style_modifiers.divine: golden divine light, ethereal glow, gods among clouds, olympian grandeur
style_modifiers.cursed: dark twisted shadows, corrupted beauty, malevolent energy, tragic
style_modifiers.epic_war: ancient battlefield, armies clashing, dust and fire, heroic chaos
style_modifiers.underworld: dark realm, glowing embers, shadows and mist, ominous beauty
style_modifiers.nature: ancient untamed nature, massive trees, primordial world, mythic landscape
style_modifiers.temple: ancient stone temple, torchlight, sacred atmosphere, carved reliefs

elena.role: goddess, queen, or powerful female figure
elena.mythology_persona: ancient deity or legendary queen, cold beauty with divine power

marcus.role: hero, warrior, or god of war
marcus.mythology_persona: legendary warrior or battle god, raw power and honor

professor.mythology_persona: ancient oracle or philosopher who has witnessed ages

aria.role: mortal hero, priestess, or tragic figure
aria.mythology_persona: chosen mortal navigating a world of gods, courage and vulnerability

backgrounds.olympus_above: Mount Olympus above the clouds, divine palaces gleaming in golden light, gods watching below, stormy sky, epic scale
backgrounds.ancient_city: vast ancient Greek or Roman city on a clifftop, stormy dramatic sky, birds in flight, woman in dark dress looking out, painterly epic
backgrounds.underworld_gates: gates of the underworld, dark glowing river Styx, skeletal trees, pale figures, haunting and beautiful
backgrounds.battlefield_troy: ancient battlefield at dusk, burning city on the horizon, armored warriors, smoke and fire, cinematic war
backgrounds.dark_ocean: ancient sea at night, mythical sea creature beneath dark waters, small ship, moonlight on waves, ominous
backgrounds.oracle_temple: ancient temple interior, incense smoke, torchlight on carved stone, oracle figure in shadows, sacred atmosphere
backgrounds.cursed_forest: dark primordial forest, ancient twisted trees, supernatural mist, pale moonlight, creatures lurking in shadow
backgrounds.throne_of_gods: divine throne room above clouds, massive marble columns, golden light shafts, supreme power and authority
backgrounds.labyrinth: stone labyrinth interior, torch flickering, shadows of something massive moving beyond walls, dread and wonder
backgrounds.frozen_tartarus: frozen underworld prison, dark ice and shadow, chains of light, tortured beauty, eternal punishment
backgrounds.sea_of_myths: mythological ocean, sea nymphs and creatures visible beneath surface, ancient ship, vast and unknowable
backgrounds.fallen_hero: aftermath of an epic battle, fallen hero on ancient ground, stormy sky clearing, tragic and beautiful

greek: The real story of Medusa -- she was not the monster
Why Prometheus really stole fire from the gods
Achilles -- the warrior who could not outrun his fate
The labyrinth of Crete and what it truly represented
Persephone -- the goddess who chose the underworld
Why Odysseus took ten years to travel a short distance
Narcissus -- the original cautionary tale of vanity
The Titan War that almost destroyed creation
norse: Ragnarok -- the end of everything and what comes after
Loki -- god, monster, or victim of the other gods
Odin sacrificed his eye for wisdom -- what did he see
The Valkyries and what they really were
Fenrir the wolf who will swallow the sun
egyptian: Anubis -- the god who weighed human hearts
Osiris murdered and resurrected -- the first resurrection myth
The curse of the pharaohs -- where it really came from
Cleopatra -- goddess, queen, or political genius
dark_tales: The myth so dark the Greeks refused to repeat it
Creatures of ancient mythology that were never explained
The forgotten god who was erased from history
When gods punished mortals -- the most cruel sentences ever given

llm_system_prompt: You are an ancient oracle and master storyteller of mythology. Write scripts with the weight and poetry of mythological texts, but accessible to modern audiences. Every sentence should feel like it carries the memory of ages. Use vivid imagery, dramatic irony, and the language of epic poetry. Characters are not just people -- they are forces. Settings are not just places -- they are living entities. Be historically and mythologically accurate where possible, noting where myths vary. Safe for all audiences -- no explicit content, but darkness and tragedy are welcome as they are core to mythology.
hook_templates: Before there were heroes, there were gods. And the gods were not kind.
This story was considered too dark to tell. Until now.
She was not the villain. She was the warning.
Every civilization feared this. And they were right to.
The myth you were taught was wrong. Here is what really happened.
thumbnail_style: Epic painterly digital art, single powerful figure against dramatic sky or divine backdrop. Dark and beautiful. Gold and storm grey palette. Bold atmospheric composition. Minimal text -- one word or short phrase in an ancient-style font. Should look like a movie poster for a mythological epic.
music_style: epic dark orchestral, ancient instruments woven through modern orchestration, haunting choir, dramatic tension and release, Hans Zimmer meets ancient Greece, 60-100bpm, deeply atmospheric and emotional

animation_notes.visual_note: SVD on high-quality painterly images produces stunning slow cape flow, hair movement, cloud drift, torch flicker effects. Keep motion subtle -- the images are so detailed that too much movement looks wrong. Motion bucket 60-90 is the sweet spot for mythology.
